Modern AI stacks need reliable inference and visual compute as much as massive training. NVIDIA's RTX PRO Server reference designs focus on that "other half" of AI: serving multimodal and agentic applications, powering digital twins, and enabling remote 3D workflows.

## What's included

- Blackwell-class RTX GPUs with enterprise drivers
- NIM microservices for optimized inference
- RTX Virtual Workstation for remote design/visualization
- Support for digital twins and robotics simulation

## Why it matters

Many teams need consistent, scalable inference and visualization close to data and users, not just giant training clusters. RTX PRO Servers provide a standardized approach for production-grade, everyday AI workloads.

-
Context: NVIDIA platform announcements (Oct 2025)
